name: Venison Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steak into 6 or 8 pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Beat egg with 2 teaspoons water.
4. Combine parmesan cheese with breadcrumbs, mixing well.
5. Dip meat in egg mixture, then roll in breadcrumb mixture.
6. Heat oil in a large skillet and fry 3 pieces at a time until brown.
7. Lay steaks in a 13x9 inch baking pan.
8. Saute onion in butter and reserved drippings until soft.
9. Add tomato paste, hot water, salt, and marjoram to the pan; boil for a few minutes, stirring well.
10. Pour about 3/4 cup sauce over steaks.
11. Top with thin slices of mozzarella cheese.
12. Pour remaining sauce over cheese.
13. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes.
